# Research Brief: RF-EV-001 (Pediatric CDS): Backfill exact-passage locators (page/section/verbatim quote)

**Objective.** RF-EV-001 (Pediatric CDS): Backfill exact-passage locators (page/section/verbatim quote) for the 6 existing pediatric anemia evidence sources so every anemia rule ties to a verifiable passage. Required output per source: authoritative citation, exact locator, verbatim threshold/statement text, and a pediatric_cds evidence-card extension block (population, assay/method, threshold, lifecycle). Gates P1 exact-passage records and de-risks Evidence Foundry E0. Guardrails: no invented thresholds; source-supported fact vs implementation-proposal must stay distinguishable; missingness never treated as normal.

**Depth.** standard  |  **Audience.** technical

## Questions

- (rq_001) What does the evidence say about RF-EV-001 (Pediatric CDS): Backfill exact-passage locators (page/section/verbatim quote)?
